name: Email Copywriting
description: Writes high-converting email campaigns, sequences, and newsletters with sharp positioning, strong subject lines, and clear funnel intent.

variables.name: email_goal
variables.description: Goal of the email: nurture leads, promote offer, deliver news, re-engage inactive subscribers

variables.name: audience
variables.description: Target audience segment and their relationship to the brand

variables.name: offer_message
variables.description: The core message, offer, or content of the email

variables.name: tone
variables.description: Tone of voice: formal, casual, urgent, warm, professional

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Primary call-to-action: what you want the reader to do
